subject: 英语单词突破
description: 广东中考英语 · 单词专项训练 · 紧贴中考高频词

modules.title: 易混动词辨析
modules.knowledge: look(看的过程)/see(看的结果)/watch(长时间观看)/read(阅读)；say(说内容)/speak(说语言)/tell(告诉)/talk(交谈)；bring(带来)/take(带走)/carry(搬运)；borrow(借入)/lend(借出)/keep(借多久)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: Please ___ the blackboard carefully. Can you ___ the words clearly?
questions.analysis: look at强调动作，see强调结果。看黑板是动作用look at，看清字是结果用see。技巧：look at=看的过程，see=看的结果，watch=长时间观看，read=阅读文字。

questions.stem: My grandfather often ___ me interesting stories before I go to bed.
questions.analysis: 讲故事用tell stories，固定搭配。say强调内容，speak强调语言/演讲，talk强调交谈。技巧：tell a story/tell a lie/tell the truth。

questions.stem: Can you ___ me your dictionary? I want to ___ it for a few days.
questions.analysis: 借给我用lend me；借几天不能用borrow（短暂动作），要用keep（延续性动词）。技巧：borrow=借入，lend=借出，keep=借多久。

questions.stem: Please ___ your homework to school tomorrow. Don't ___ it at home.
questions.analysis: 带来学校用bring（朝向说话人）；落在家里是leave sth. at home，不是forget。技巧：forget+东西=忘记某物，leave+东西+地点=把某物落在某地。

questions.stem: ___! Can you ___ someone singing in the next room?
questions.analysis: Listen!是祈使句，表示听的动作；hear表示听到的结果。技巧：listen=听的过程（listen to），hear=听的结果。和look/see的区别一样。

questions.stem: I ___ 100 yuan from my mother and ___ it to my friend.
questions.analysis: 从妈妈那借入用borrowed；借出给朋友用lent。技巧：borrow from sb.（借入），lend to sb.（借出）。

questions.stem: The box is too heavy. I can't ___ it to the third floor.
questions.analysis: 搬运重物用carry，强调负重搬运。bring/take强调方向。技巧：carry=搬运（有重量感），bring=带来，take=带走。

questions.stem: — What did he ___ at the meeting? — He ___ we should work harder.
questions.analysis: 强调说的内容用say，后面接说话的内容。技巧：say+内容，speak+语言，tell+人，talk+about。

modules.title: 易混形容词/副词辨析
modules.knowledge: hard(努力地/硬的)/hardly(几乎不)；late(晚)/lately(最近)；near(附近)/nearly(几乎)；good(形容词)/well(副词/身体好)；alone(独自)/lonely(孤独)；quite(相当)/quiet(安静)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: He studied ___ for the exam, so he passed it easily.
questions.analysis: 修饰study用副词，hard本身既是形容词也是副词，意为努力地。hardly意为几乎不，意思相反。技巧：hard=努力地，hardly=几乎不（否定含义）。中考最爱考这对。

questions.stem: I could ___ believe my eyes when I saw the beautiful view.
questions.analysis: 句意为几乎不能相信，用hardly（几乎不）。技巧：hardly=almost not，本身含否定义。

questions.stem: He lives ___, but he never feels ___ because he has many friends.
questions.analysis: alone=独自一人（客观上），lonely=孤独（情感上）。他独居但不孤独。技巧：alone强调状态，lonely强调感受。

questions.stem: The baby is ___. Please keep ___.
questions.analysis: asleep=睡着的（状态），sleepy=困的。keep quiet=保持安静，quite=相当。技巧：asleep是表语形容词，不能放名词前。quite和quiet拼写相近但意思完全不同。

questions.stem: She is a ___ student. She does everything ___.
questions.analysis: 修饰名词student用good（形容词），修饰动词does用well（副词）。技巧：good=形容词，well=副词/形容词（身体好）。

questions.stem: He arrived ___ for the meeting. He has been very busy ___.
questions.analysis: arrive late=迟到（late副词），lately=最近（=recently）。技巧：late可作形容词也可作副词（晚），lately=最近。

questions.stem: The park is very ___ my home. It's ___ five minutes' walk.
questions.analysis: near my home=在我家附近（near介词），nearly=几乎（=almost）。技巧：near=附近，nearly=几乎。拼写差一个字母，意思差很远。

questions.stem: The ___ fish is still ___. Don't touch it!
questions.analysis: living fish=活着的鱼（前置定语用living），still alive=仍然活着（表语用alive）。技巧：living可放名词前，alive只能放系动词后。lively=活泼的。

modules.title: 易混名词辨析
modules.knowledge: family(家庭/家人)/home(家/归属感)/house(房子)；job(具体工作)/work(泛指工作)；problem(麻烦的问题)/question(寻求答案的问题)；voice(嗓音)/noise(噪音)/sound(声音)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: I have a happy ___. There are four people in my ___.
questions.analysis: a happy family=一个幸福的家庭（指家人），in my family=在我家（指家庭成员）。技巧：family强调家人，home强调有归属感的地方，house强调建筑物。

questions.stem: He found a new ___ in a bank. He has a lot of ___ to do every day.
questions.analysis: a new job=一份新工作（可数名词），a lot of work=很多工作（不可数名词）。技巧：job是可数名词（a job），work是不可数名词（不能加a）。

questions.stem: The math ___ is too difficult. I can't work out this ___.
questions.analysis: math problem=数学难题（需要解决的麻烦），work out this problem=解决这个问题。技巧：problem=麻烦/困难（solve a problem），question=疑问（answer a question）。

questions.stem: Please speak in a low ___. Don't make any ___ in the library.
questions.analysis: in a low voice=低声说话（人的嗓音），make noise=制造噪音。技巧：voice=人的嗓音，noise=噪音（不悦耳），sound=泛指一切声音。

questions.stem: There are many ___ in the park. Some old ___ are playing chess.
questions.analysis: people本身是复数，表示人们；表示民族时才是可数名词。技巧：people=人们（本身就是复数），person=个人（可数，a person/two persons）。

questions.stem: The ___ in this shop are very beautiful. I bought a new ___ yesterday.
questions.analysis: clothes=衣服（复数，不能加s），a piece of clothing=一件衣服。技巧：clothes永远复数，cloth=布料，clothing=衣着的统称（不可数）。

modules.title: 高频固定搭配 & 介词短语
modules.knowledge: be good at(擅长), be proud of(为……自豪), look forward to(期待), pay attention to(注意), take care of(照顾), be interested in(对……感兴趣), be strict with(对……严格), be different from(与……不同)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My sister is very ___ playing the piano. She practices every day.
questions.analysis: 擅长做某事：be good at doing sth.。be good for=对……有益，be good to=对……友好，be good with=善于应付……。技巧：at+doing是固定模式。

questions.stem: All of us are ___ our motherland. It's becoming stronger and stronger.
questions.analysis: 为祖国自豪：be proud of。be afraid of=害怕，be tired of=厌倦，be sure of=确信。技巧：proud是形容词，of后面接令人自豪的对象。

questions.stem: We are all ___ visiting the Great Wall next summer.
questions.analysis: 期待做某事：look forward to+doing。注意to是介词！技巧：look forward to+doing是中考超级高频考点。

questions.stem: Please ___ what the teacher says. It's very important.
questions.analysis: 注意老师说的话：pay attention to。to是介词，后接名词/doing。技巧：pay attention to+doing/n.，to同样是介词。

questions.stem: My grandmother is ill. I need to ___ her at home.
questions.analysis: 照顾奶奶：take care of。take part in=参加，take pride in=以……为傲，take place=发生。技巧：take care of=look after，两者同义。

questions.stem: Tom is very ___ science. He wants to be a scientist in the future.
questions.analysis: 对科学感兴趣：be interested in。be strict with=对……严格，be different from=与……不同。技巧：interested in+doing/n.，interesting是令人感兴趣的（修饰物）。

questions.stem: Our teacher is very ___ us. She never allows us to be late.
questions.analysis: 对人严格用be strict with，对事严格用be strict in/about。技巧：strict with+人，strict in+事。广东中考易错点。

questions.stem: Chinese culture is quite ___ Western culture in many ways.
questions.analysis: 与……不同：be different from。similar to=相似，the same as=相同，far from=远离。技巧：different from是固定搭配，from不能换成with或to。

modules.title: 中考高频短语动词
modules.knowledge: put on/off/up/away/out; turn on/off/up/down; get up/on/off/along/over; take off/away/care of/part in; give up/away/out; look after/for/up/through/forward to。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: It's cold outside. You'd better ___ your coat.
questions.analysis: 穿上外套：put on。put off=推迟，put away=收起来，put up=张贴/搭建。技巧：put on=穿上（动作），wear=穿着（状态）。

questions.stem: The sports meeting was ___ because of the heavy rain.
questions.analysis: 运动会被推迟：put off。put out=扑灭。技巧：put off=postpone（推迟），off有离开/远离的含义。

questions.stem: Please ___ the lights before you leave the room.
questions.analysis: 关灯：turn off。turn on=打开，turn up=调大（音量），turn down=调小/拒绝。技巧：on=开，off=关，up=大，down=小。

questions.stem: I can't hear the music clearly. Can you ___ the radio?
questions.analysis: 听不清所以要调大音量：turn up。技巧：turn up=调大（音量/温度），也引申为出现。

questions.stem: When you don't know a word, you can ___ it ___ in the dictionary.
questions.analysis: 查字典：look up。look for=寻找，look after=照顾，look through=浏览。技巧：look up+单词（查字典），look up to+人（仰慕）。

questions.stem: Smoking is bad for your health. You should ___ it ___.
questions.analysis: 戒烟：give up smoking。give away=赠送/泄露，give out=分发/耗尽。技巧：give up+doing，和stop doing类似。

questions.stem: The plane will ___ at 10 o'clock. We need to hurry.
questions.analysis: 飞机起飞：take off。take away=带走，take care of=照顾，take part in=参加。技巧：take off=起飞/脱下，两个意思都很常用。

questions.stem: I don't ___ well with my new classmate. We often argue.
questions.analysis: 与……相处融洽：get along (well) with sb.。get up=起床，get off=下车，get over=克服。技巧：get along with=get on with，两者同义。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: He finally achieved ___ (succeed) after years of hard work.
questions.analysis: achieved后接名词作宾语，succeed的名词是success。技巧：动词(succeed)→名词(success)→形容词(successful)→副词(successfully)。

questions.stem: You should read the instructions ___ (careful) before using it.
questions.analysis: 修饰动词read用副词，careful变副词carefully（直接加ly）。技巧：形容词+ly=副词，happy→happily（y变i加ly）。

questions.stem: Eating more vegetables is good for your ___ (healthy).
questions.analysis: your后面接名词，healthy是形容词，名词是health。技巧：名词(health)→形容词(healthy)→副词(healthily)。

questions.stem: He made an important ___ (decide) at the meeting.
questions.analysis: an important后面接名词，decide的名词是decision。技巧：动词以-de结尾变名词常为-sion（decide→decision）。

questions.stem: Thank you for your ___ (invite). I'd love to come.
questions.analysis: your后面接名词，invite的名词是invitation。技巧：invite→invitation（去e加ation），和decide→decision变形不同。

questions.stem: She sings very ___ (beautiful). Everyone enjoys her songs.
questions.analysis: 修饰动词sings用副词，beautiful变副词beautifully（直接加ly）。技巧：大部分形容词+ly变副词，但good→well是特例。

questions.stem: The ___ (important) of learning English is clear to everyone.
questions.analysis: The...of结构中用名词，important的名词是importance。技巧：形容词以-tant结尾常变名词为-tance。

questions.stem: He is a ___ (help) person. He always gives others a hand.
questions.analysis: 修饰person用形容词，help的形容词是helpful。技巧：名词+ful=形容词（help→helpful, care→careful, use→useful）。

modules.title: 不规则动词（过去式/过去分词）
modules.knowledge: 中考必背25组：go→went→gone, do→did→done, have→had→had, see→saw→seen, get→got→got, make→made→made, take→took→taken, come→came→come, know→knew→known, write→wrote→written等。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: I ___ a new bike from the shop yesterday.
questions.analysis: yesterday是过去时标志，buy的过去式是bought。技巧：buy→bought，和bring→brought一起记，都是-ought结尾。

questions.stem: Have you ever ___ to Beijing? I ___ there last summer.
questions.analysis: have been to=去过（已回），have gone to=去了（未回）。last summer过去时用went。技巧：been to=去过已回，gone to=去了未回。go→went→gone必背。

questions.stem: She ___ a letter to her pen pal last night.
questions.analysis: last night是过去时标志，write的过去式是wrote。技巧：write→wrote→written，注意过去式和过去分词不同。

questions.stem: The cake was ___ by my mother. It's delicious!
questions.analysis: 被动语态was+done，make的过去分词是made。技巧：make→made→made（过去式和过去分词同形）。

questions.stem: He ___ me a beautiful gift on my birthday.
questions.analysis: 过去时用gave。give→gave→given。技巧：give的过去式gave，过去分词given。

questions.stem: I have ___ English for three years.
questions.analysis: have done现在完成时，learn的过去分词可以是learned或learnt。技巧：learn→learned/learnt，两种变形都对。

questions.stem: He ___ his keys at home and couldn't get into the house.
questions.analysis: 过去时用left。leave→left→left。技巧：leave→left和feel→felt一起记。

questions.stem: The teacher ___ us how to solve the math problem.
questions.analysis: 过去时用taught。teach→taught→taught。技巧：teach→taught和catch→caught一起记，都是-aught结尾。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的适当形式填空。

questions.stem: He ___ (write) a letter to his friend last night.
questions.analysis: last night过去时，write的过去式是wrote。技巧：write→wrote→written。

questions.stem: The bridge was ___ (build) in 2010.
questions.analysis: 被动语态was+done，build的过去分词是built。技巧：build→built→built。

questions.stem: She has ___ (speak) English since she was five.
questions.analysis: has done现在完成时，speak的过去分词是spoken。技巧：speak→spoke→spoken。

questions.stem: He ___ (feel) very happy when he heard the good news.
questions.analysis: 过去时用felt。feel→felt→felt。技巧：feel→felt和keep→kept都是eel/eep变elt/ept型。

questions.stem: I have ___ (eat) my lunch. I'm full now.
questions.analysis: have done现在完成时，eat的过去分词是eaten。技巧：eat→ate→eaten。注意过去式ate发音。

modules.title: 不规则名词复数
modules.knowledge: child→children, foot→feet, tooth→teeth, mouse→mice, sheep→sheep(单复同形), deer→deer, Chinese→Chinese, man→men, woman→women, knife→knives, leaf→leaves。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: Look! There are two ___ playing in the garden.
questions.analysis: two后面用复数，child的复数是children。技巧：child→children是广东中考最常考的不规则名词之一。

questions.stem: I brush my ___ twice a day to keep them healthy.
questions.analysis: 不止一颗牙用复数，tooth的复数是teeth。技巧：tooth→teeth，foot→feet，都是oo变ee。

questions.stem: There are many ___ on the grassland. They look so cute.
questions.analysis: sheep是单复数同形，不管前面有没有many，都不加s。技巧：sheep、deer、Chinese单复数长一样。

questions.stem: There are three ___ and two ___ in the room.
questions.analysis: man的复数是men，woman的复数是women，都是a变e。技巧：注意发音也不同。

questions.stem: Autumn is here. The ___ are turning yellow.
questions.analysis: leaf的复数是leaves（f变v加es）。技巧：以f/fe结尾的名词变复数常把f变v加es。

questions.stem: There are two ___ in the kitchen. Be careful!
questions.analysis: knife的复数是knives（f变v加es）。技巧：knife→knives，wife→wives，life→lives。

questions.stem: We are all ___. We love our country.
questions.analysis: Chinese单复数同形，不能加s。技巧：以-ese结尾的国籍词（Chinese, Japanese）单复数同形。

questions.stem: Look! There are three ___ in the corner. The cat is very excited.
questions.analysis: mouse的复数是mice。技巧：mouse→mice，中考高频不规则变化。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的适当形式填空。

questions.stem: There are many ___ (sheep) on the farm.
questions.analysis: sheep是单复数同形，不用变。技巧：sheep/deer/Chinese单复数同形。

questions.stem: My ___ (foot) hurt after walking for so long.
questions.analysis: 两只脚用复数，foot的复数是feet。技巧：foot→feet（oo变ee）。
